DS.label: Design System Tokens
DS.notes: Added 18 new color constants (darkBgPrimary, darkBgSecondary, darkCard, darkTertiary, darkBorderPrimary, darkBorderLight, textOnDarkPrimary, textOnDarkSecondary, textOnDarkTertiary, primarySubtle, tabBarBackground, tabInactive, successSubtle, warningSubtle, errorSubtle, infoSubtle, riderCardBg, trackingMapBg). Replaced all deprecated darkSurface/darkSurfaceHighest/darkBorder/darkBackground tokens app-wide with new constants. Updated dark theme scaffold background and colorScheme surface to darkBgPrimary/darkCard.

A.label: Auth + Navigation
A.notes: Bottom nav pill (cornerRadius 36, tabBarBackground bg, tab items cornerRadius 26). ForgotPassword + EmailSent views consolidated in forgot_password_view.dart with _sent boolean toggle. Route /forgot-password added.

C.label: Events
C.notes: AppEventBadge rewritten with EventBadgeVariant enum, solid fill, cornerRadius 20. DocumentSlotPill rewritten with DocumentSlot model, status badges (successSubtle/warningSubtle/errorSubtle/infoSubtle). CTA bar uses darkBgPrimary + top border. Tracking widgets resized and recolored per spec.

D.label: Garage / Vehicles
D.notes: darkSurface→darkCard, darkSurfaceHighest→darkCard, darkBorder→darkBorderPrimary app-wide in vehicle files. VehicleSpecRow rewritten as divider-separated rows in a card container. VehicleGarageOverviewItem rewritten as compact stat card. VehicleSelectionBottomSheet rewritten with YCuIq spec (darkCard bg, radio selection, add vehicle link, dividers). GarageOptionsBottomSheet bg updated to darkCard.

E.label: Maintenance
E.notes: MaintenanceCardBody left-border urgency color (3px), darkCard bg, cornerRadius 12, 40×40 circle icon. MaintenanceFiltersBottomSheet uses darkCard bg with darkBorderPrimary border. Deprecated color tokens replaced throughout maintenance presentation files.

F.label: Registration
F.notes: Section cards updated to darkCard bg + darkBorderPrimary border + cornerRadius 12. CTA bar updated to darkBgPrimary bg + top border only (no shadow).

G.label: Profile / Users
G.notes: ProfileHeader uses gradient ring avatar (accent→accent 40%). ProfileActionsList uses dark card container with border + menu items + dividers + error-colored logout. ProfileMainVehicleCard shows vehicle with badge. RiderProfileContent rewritten with gradient avatar, stats row, follow button.

globalColorMigration.filesAffected: ~40 dart files across all feature presentation layers
